_comment: Single source of truth for the accepted SWTools runtime artifact hashes. Current accepted package: releases/1.1.6/SWTools-1.1.6-Setup.exe, setup sha256 d3f74045c240d3a8e313cd8720a5b165627a3f80c106d971dd72d729a74ca694. Both scripts/verify_release_package.ps1 and scripts/sw_test_preflight.ps1 load their default expected hashes from this file. Update here when the accepted build changes.
